---

---

---
title: "Multiomics Learning — Days 2 & 3"
author: "Kanupriya"
date: today
format: html
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
library(patchwork)
library(here)
```

## Day 2 — Data wrangling summary

```{r}
penguins |>
  group_by(species, sex) |>
  summarise(
    mean_mass = mean(body_mass_g, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

## Day 3 — Publication figures

```{r}
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5
#| warning: false
knitr::include_graphics(here("outputs", "figures", "combined_day3.png"))
```
